event: Indian horsemen at a Mughal gateway in Old Delhi
description: An orientalist painting depicting several horsemen and figures gathered at the base of a grand Mughal sandstone gateway. The massive pointed arch is decorated with intricate geometric and floral carved patterns, flanked by latticed windows and ornamental stonework. Figures on horseback and on foot, some in turbans and flowing garments, mill about in the archway's shadow. Through the arch, bright daylight reveals a view beyond. The warm reddish-brown tones of the sandstone dominate the palette, with the detailed architectural ornamentation rendered with careful precision.

_meta.title: Indian Horsemen at the Gateway of Alah ou din, Old Delhi
